verses.text: Jakob khuadak a, Esau tawh mihing za li hong pai a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Leah, Rachel, leh nasem numei nihte' lakah a naupangte a khen hi
Amah in nasem numeite leh a tate a masa penin, tua ciangin Leah leh a tate, tua ciangin Rachel leh Josef a nunung penin a koih hi
Amah ahih leh amaute' mai-ah pai-in, a sanggampa' kiang nai a tun' matengin leilak lamah sagihvei a kun hi
Ahih hangin amah a dawn dingin Esau hong tai-in, amah ngawng kawi a, pomcipin nam a, amaute a kap uh hi
Esau khuadak to-in nupite leh naupangte a muh ciangin amah in, “Nang tawh a om hihte kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Jakob in, “Pasian in hehpihna tawh na nasempa a piak tate ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin nasem numeite in hong naih uh a, amau leh a tate hong kun uh hi
Leah leh a tate in zong tua bangmahin hong naihin a kun uh hi. A nunung penin Josef leh Rachel in hong naihin a kun uh hi
Esau in, “Ka kituahpih hih a honte khempeuh bang na cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Jakob in dawngin, “Ka topa' maipha zon'na ding,” na ci hi
Ahih hangin Esau in, “A kicing nei ing, sanggam aw; nang' neihte nangma-a' dingin kem in,” a ci hi

Jakob in, “Hilo hi, nang' tungah hong thum ing. Na muhna-ah maipha ngah ka hih leh ka khutsung panin ka letsongte hong sang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih banga maipha tawh kei nong san'na, na maitang ka muh ding pen Pasian' maitang muh tawh kibang taktak hi

Nang' kianga hong kipaipih ka letsong nong san'na dingin hong thum ing. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kei hong hehpih mahmah a, a kicing ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin amah in kun teitei ahih manin Esau in zong a sang hi
Tua ciangin Esau in, “Tu-in paikhawm ni. Na mai-ah kei ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Jakob in ama kiangah, “Naupangte a hatlohna ka topa in na thei hi. Tuuhonte leh bawngte, a nongek neite ka lungphamawh hi. Ni khat sung kinak hawl lua leh ganhonte khempeuh si ding uh hi
Na nasempa' mai-ah ka topa na pai in la, Seir-ah ka topa' kiang kong tun' matengin ka mai-a om ganhingte' thahatna leh naupangte' hatna tawh kituakin damdamin kong makaih ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Esau in, “Kei tawh a om mite pawlkhat, nang' kiangah hong nusia ning,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “A kisapna bang om ahi hiam? Ka topa' muhna-ah kei maipha hong ngahsak in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Esau in tua ni-in ama lampi zui-in Seir-ah a ciahkik hi
Ahih hangin Jakob, Sukkoth lamah pai a, ama-a' ding inn leh a ganhingte-a' ding hampheng a lam hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun a min Sukkoth, kici hi
Paddanaram panin hong pai lampi, Kanaan gam sunga om Shekhem khuapi-ah lungmuang takin Jakob hong tung a, a khuapi kiangah phual a sat hi
Amah in Shekhem' pa Hamor' innkuante' tung panin a puanbuk lamnasa leitang dangka za khat tawh a lei hi
Tua lai-ah amah in biakna tau khat bawl a, El-Elohe-Israel, ci-in min a phuak hi.
